creator: dan@obluda.cz
text:
databases/firebird25-client require staging or will be removed

Fix:
Patch is attached. 

NOTE: databases/firebird25-server needs to be staggified first (PR: 191701)

--- databases/firebird25-client/Makefile.orig	2014-07-07 16:05:01.000000000 +0200
+++ databases/firebird25-client/Makefile	2014-07-07 16:05:17.000000000 +0200
@@ -13,5 +13,4 @@
 
 CLIENT_ONLY=	yes
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
